meta.content: Build cyber workforce resilience with our unmatched skills development and hands-on learning platform and library.

a.class: plausible-event-name=Nav+Click plausible-event-position=top+nav plausible-event-title=Enroll+now btn btn-sm btn-primary h-[2.125rem] w-[7.5rem] astro-odqmdjqa
btn btn-sm btn-secondary h-[2.125rem] w-[7.5rem] astro-odqmdjqa

div.h2: Meet OSAI+: OffSec AI Red Teamer

div.p: OSAI+ is our newest certification for hands-on offensive operations in AI environments
Train in live labs. Hack purpose built environments. Level up where it matters. From individual contributors to global teams, OffSec powers cybersecurity at scale.

a.class: btn btn-sm w-full py-1 md:w-fit md:px-10 lg:px-11 btn-primary astro-ewxirvlt
btn btn-sm w-full py-1 md:w-fit md:px-10 lg:px-11 btn-secondary astro-ewxirvlt

section.class: mx-auto flex w-full flex-col gap-6 astro-hs4enucr

div.h2: Candidates with certifications stand out to organizations

li.span: prefer to hire candidates with certifications
would pay for an employee to obtain a cybersecurity certification
say it's hard to find candidates with technology-focused certifications

div.h2: Learn One delivers focused, end-to-end cybersecurity training
div.p: A complete learning experience that combines instruction, practice, and validation to develop job ready skills for modern security roles.
Includes one year of access to one 200 or 300-level course, the associated labs, and two exam attempts

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline h-fit w-full self-end border-[1.5px] py-1.5 astro-vgbno4n4

a.p: Flexible access to OffSec training, labs, and content in one subscription
Industry respected certifications that prove real world security skills
Guided learning paths that build practical skills from fundamentals to advanced

div.p: Experience a wide range of lab topics for any level of skill with Proving Ground's realistic environments.

a.class: btn-primary btn btn-sm w-full py-1 sm:w-fit sm:px-5 lg:px-8 astro-q4qw73xp
btn-secondary btn btn-sm w-full py-1 sm:w-fit sm:px-5 lg:px-8 astro-q4qw73xp

img.h2: Empowering learners with a community of support

div.p: Our community members connect, communicate and collaborate on all things cybersecurity.

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary w-full px-10 py-1 sm:w-fit astro-mzf327bj

div.h2: Hands-on exams and courses designed to validate real world cybersecurity skills

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-primary w-full px-10 py-1 sm:w-fit astro-mdrtrp3k

div.p: (IBM, Cost of a Data Breach Report 2024)

li.span: average costs for orgs experiencing a shortage of security skills
increase in the share of orgs paying fines of more than $50,000
days to identify and contain breaches involving stolen credentials

div.h2: The comprehensive platform for building cyber-resilient teams
div.p: This isn't passive video learning. It's readiness training that builds muscle memory in high-pressure, real-world environments.
Unlimited OffSec Learning Library access with flexible terms and volume discounts available

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline h-fit w-full self-end border-[1.5px] py-1.5 astro-vgbno4n4

div.h3: The best training ground is your own.
div.p: Shape your dedicated ranges to match your organization's environment— your technology, your vulnerabilities, your attack vectors.

a.class: btn btn-sm btn-secondary w-full py-1.5 sm:w-fit sm:px-12 astro-ievz73vk

a.p: Develop the skills your offensive team needs to be attack-ready against cyber threats
Mitigate risk and protect your organization through extensive cyber defense strategies
Prepare for the latest threats by staging team face-offs in live-fire tournaments

div.p: Find the talent you need at top-speed. Filter job seekers by certification, skill pins, location, and certification date.

a.class: btn-primary btn btn-sm w-full py-1 sm:w-fit sm:px-5 lg:px-8 astro-q4qw73xp

li.span: We created Kali Linux, the world's most used offensive security toolkit
We built OSCP, the gold standard in penetration testing certifications
We train professionals to think like attackers and operate with precision

a.class: btn btn-sm w-full px-5 py-1.5 sm:w-fit sm:px-8 xl:px-10 btn-secondary astro-vum3xd6u

div.p: Get the latest updates around resources, events & promotions from OffSec
